creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 212012
svn diff for x11-fonts/font-manager

x11-fonts/font-manager is currently marked
with an EOL because it uses python27. While I
understand removal of python27 in on the horizon
for good reason. Python27 doesn't *yet* have an
EOL, and I'd like the time to make font-manager
python3 performant. Rather than being required to
re-introduce it to the ports tree.

The attached svn(1) diff(1) removes the death
sentence from x11-fonts/font-manager.

I'm working on it as I submit this pr(1).

Please stop doing this to my ports. I'm working
on them, and this just adds even more time/work.

That's it!

Thanks! :)

--Chris
